examples: You have impaired glucose tolerance, also called prediabetes.
With prediabetes, the subtle balance between glucose and insulin has been thrown off.
If the test results show that you're free of diabetes and prediabetes, you should be tested again within three years.
Patients found to have diabetes or prediabetes are then typically referred to diabetes education at Novant or elsewhere.
Patients with prediabetes may have no symptoms at all, but some people experience problems associated with diabetes like blurred vision, unusual thirst and frequent urination.
